Fields.Name: Disable Param - Network Test
Fields.Description: Parameters marked with  are excluded in the NT version package.

Fields.Name: Enable Fast Travel Event Flag ID
Fields.Description: Fast travel permission flag ID

Fields.Name: Weather Lot - Time Offset
Fields.Description: Offset for weather lottery time (unit - in-game seconds). Divide by the in-game time scale of the game properties to get real time

Fields.Name: Weather Create Asset Limit ID
Fields.Description: ID used to limit the generation of assets generated by the weather asset generation parameter .xlsm

Fields.Name: Map Visibility Type
Fields.Description: Map visibility type

Fields.Name: Sound Indoor Type
Fields.Description: Set whether to divide the map GD setting indoor into indoor or completely indoor for sound (SEQ09833).

Fields.Name: Reverb Default Type
Fields.Description: Specifies the reverb default type for this map

Fields.Name: BGM Location Info
Fields.Description: Specify location default information for BGM

Fields.Name: Environmental Location Info
Fields.Description: Specifies location default information for ambient sounds

Fields.Name: Map Additional Sound Bank ID
Fields.Description: Specify the ID of the map addition bank of the sound to be additionally loaded (-1 - no map addition bank) (SEQ15725)

Fields.Name: Map Height Info for Sound
Fields.Description: Map height information for sound [m] (SEQ15727)

Fields.Name: Enable Blend Timezone Envmap
Fields.Description: Specifies whether to time blend the environment map. Only Texure in the 0th time zone is shot and used. GPU load and memory are reduced. This setting is valid only for Legacy (m00-m49) (SEQ16464).

Fields.Name: Override GI Resolution - XSS
Fields.Description: Overwrites the GI resolution used in XSS (Xbox SeriesS, Lockhart)

Fields.Name: Map High Hit Switch - AABB Depth
Fields.Description: Map high hit switching judgment AABB_width Depth (XZ) [m] (SEQ16295)

Fields.Name: Map High Hit Switch - AABB Height
Fields.Description: Map high hit switching judgment AABB_ height (Y) [m] (SEQ16295)

Fields.Name: Map High Hit Switch - Play Distance
Fields.Description: Map high hit switching judgment play distance [m]. Normally the default should be fine. For smaller AABB, adjust as needed. If the play is too small, switching will occur frequently. Not expected if larger than AABB size (SEQ 16295)

Fields.Name: Automatic Draw Group - Back Side Pixel Count
Fields.Description: Number of pixels to be judged on the back side in automatic drawing group calculation

Fields.Name: Player Light Scale
Fields.Description: Specify the scale to be applied to the PC and PC horse resident light source on this map (SEQ16562).

Fields.Name: Enable Timezone Player Light Scale
Fields.Description: Does this map change the Player light intensity scale depending on the PC, PC horse resident light source, and time zone? (SEQ 16562)

Fields.Name: Disable Automatic Cliff Wind
Fields.Description: Do you want to disable automatic cliff wind SE? (SEQ15729)

Fields.Name: Open Character Activation Threshold
Fields.Description: Open character activation limit_evaluation value threshold

Fields.Name: Map Mimicry Establishment Param ID
Fields.Description: Mimicry probability parameter ID by map (SEQ22471)

Fields.Name: Override GI Resolution - XSX
Fields.Description: Overwrites the GI resolution used on XSX (Xbox Series X, Anaconda)
